message:
fix(rollback): Correct mock sha256sum output in tests

The mock sha256sum commands were returning "hash  /path" format, but the
actual command uses `| cut -d' ' -f1` which extracts just the hash. Since
MockSshExecutor doesn't execute shell pipes, the mock should return only
the hash value that would result after the cut operation.

This fixes 3 failing tests:
- test_rollback_success_with_mock
- test_rollback_verifies_hash_when_enabled
- test_rollback_graceful_shutdown_order

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
